content.text:
The track ahead shows a long straight with the car well-centered on the yellow dashed line, and a right-hand curve beginning in the far distance around x=6.3-6.5.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 18, target index = (18+5) % 121 = 23
- Target WP23: x=6.5025, y=0.7188
- Car: x=5.6154, y=0.6737, heading=-1.171°
- dy = 0.7188 - 0.6737 = 0.0451, dx = 6.5025 - 5.6154 = 0.8871
- bearing = atan2(0.0451, 0.8871) = 2.912°
- delta = 2.912 - (-1.171) = +4.083° → |delta| < 5°, go straight

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.381m, distance_from_center = 0.0106m
- edge_distance ≈ 0.370m → well clear on both sides

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car is nearly perfectly centered on a long straight with delta ~4.1°, just under the go-straight threshold; maintain full speed with no steering correction.",

    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving right around x=6.3-6.5.",
    "Big right curve begins around waypoint index 22-30 (x~6.3-7.2, y increases from 0.7 to 1.4).",
    "After the right curve, track loops back along y≈2.77 heading left.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Car heading is ~-1.2° (nearly due east), nearly perfectly centered.",
    "Right curve starts significantly around WP24-30; prepare to steer right when approaching x~6.4.",
    "No objects on track detected.",
    "Boundary safety check: edge_distance ~0.370m, well clear on both sides."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {

    "y": [0.6798, 0.6781, 0.6762, 0.6737],

  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP23 at (6.503, 0.719): bearing=2.91°, delta=+4.08° → essentially straight, no correction needed.",

  "steering_angle": 0.0
}
```
